step_rationale: Fibrin-specific degradation product indicating active fibrinolysis and thrombus turnover.
mechanism: Fibrinogen B-beta 15-42 peptide is a fibrin-specific breakdown product marking active fibrinolysis and thrombus remodeling.

references.title: Fibrin metabolism in patients with acute myocardial infarction during and after treatment with tissue-type plasminogen activator.
